title: Sarcochilus keffordii
taxonomy: Sarcochilus keffordii is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Diurideae. The genus Sarcochilus is also part of the subfamily Orchidoideae and is commonly known as the "Australian sarcos". This orchid species is endemic to Western Australia and is characterized by its unique and delicate flowers. The classification of Sarcochilus keffordii reflects its evolutionary relationships and adaptation to its native environment.
uses: Sarcochilus keffordii has been traditionally used in some cultures for its potential medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
